Nunc ut sem vitae risus tristique posuere. design, digital nomad Kanke, 2026-07-11T22:20:00+00:00 1134723 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-heading-ux-ui-design-k7-tech-1134723 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png CRM & Lifecycle Manager Joko <p style="min-height:1.5em">At Joko, we help consumers shop smarter<strong>. </strong>Our mission is to revolutionize shopping, empowering people to find what they need, make informed decisions, and save money.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em">Founded in Paris, Joko is a tech company and certified B Corp with over 105 talents across Paris, Barcelona, and New York (and beyond). More than 6 million users already save money every day at 10,000+ merchants with Joko.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em">From cashback and automatic coupons to price alerts and carbon tracking, we keep expanding our products to make shopping smarter. We芒聙聶re now building an AI-powered shopping assistant to help users find the best products by price, quality, and environmental impact.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em">Having reached profitability in our core market, we芒聙聶re now scaling globally, with a strong focus on the US.<br /><br /><strong>It芒聙聶s still day 1, come build the future of shopping with us!</strong></p><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><p style="min-height:1.5em"><em>This position is remote-friendly.</em></p><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><h3><strong>冒聼搂職 Our Marketing team</strong></h3><p style="min-height:1.5em">No one is more creative and data-driven than this team; they truly combine the best of both worlds. The Marketing team芒聙聶s mission is to put our product into the hearts and hands of millions of users around the world.</p><ul style="min-height:1.5em"><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">The Growth Team builds and scales innovative growth engines to conquer markets, attract, and retain users.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">The Brand &amp; Communications Team shapes Joko's long-term vision and builds a lasting emotional connection with users.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">The Campaign &amp; Merchandising Team drives our B2C campaign calendar and elevates the shopping experience.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">The B2B Marketing Team positions Joko as the top partner in our space and builds a standout employer brand.</p></li></ul><p style="min-height:1.5em">Led by Isa, our CMO, the team is constantly innovating to take the business to new heights.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><h3><strong>冒聼聨炉 What you will do</strong></h3><p style="min-height:1.5em">As <strong>CRM &amp; Lifecycle Manager</strong>, your mission is to design and run lifecycle programs that turn new signups into engaged, loyal, high-LTV Joko users. You will own the end-to-end CRM strategy across in-app, push, and email from the first onboarding message to the campaign that reactivates dormant users. You will join the Growth team, report to the VP Growth, and partner daily with Product, Data, and Brand teams.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><p style="min-height:1.5em">Your main missions will be:</p><ul style="min-height:1.5em"><li><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Guide new users to their first Joko 芒聙聹wow芒聙聺 moment:</strong> The first days shape everything that follows. You芒聙聶ll design the onboarding journey: messaging, timing, and triggers so every new user feels understood and reaches activation quickly. At our scale, getting those first touches right compounds into millions of engaged users.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Turn engaged users into power users, and power users into advocates:</strong> You芒聙聶ll build retention and referral programs that deepen usage among our best users, drive word of mouth, and lift long-term retention.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Maximize LTV across the full lifecycle:</strong> You芒聙聶ll design cross-channel journeys that deliver the right benefit to the right user at the right moment. You芒聙聶ll partner closely with Data to turn behavioral signals into segmentation and triggers, and with Product to keep lifecycle nudges tightly aligned with the in-app experience.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Raise the bar on experimentation:</strong> You芒聙聶ll run a continuous A/B testing program (hypotheses, tests, learnings, iterations) to improve existing flows and challenge our current lifecycle map. Every decision should be grounded in evidence, not intuition.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Take CRM to the next level with AI:</strong> You芒聙聶ll use AI to automate the operational grind (segmentation, copy iteration, QA, reporting) and unlock what we couldn芒聙聶t run manually: sharper personalization, faster experimentation cycles, and richer lifecycle logic. You芒聙聶ll decide where AI genuinely moves the needle (and where it doesn芒聙聶t), then ship production solutions.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Drive growth across the company:</strong> You芒聙聶ll work hand-in-hand with Product, Data, User Acquisition, and Brand so CRM compounds alongside everything else we芒聙聶re building.</p></li></ul><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><h3><strong>冒聼聭聙 Who we're looking for</strong></h3><ul style="min-height:1.5em"><li><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Experience:</strong> You have 5+ years of experience in B2C CRM or lifecycle marketing, ideally in a high-growth mobile or consumer app. You芒聙聶ve owned lifecycle programs end-to-end, not just executed individual components.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>CRM craft:</strong> You芒聙聶re hands-on with modern CRM platforms (Braze, Iterable, <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow" href="http://Customer.io">Customer.io</a>, or similar) and you know what 芒聙聹good芒聙聺 looks like across in-app, push, and email. Deliverability, segmentation logic, template design, and orchestration are second nature.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Data-driven to the core:</strong> You read cohort curves, funnel data, and A/B test results fluently. You use data to form opinions and drive decisions, not just to build reports.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Experimentation mindset:</strong> You芒聙聶ve run structured A/B testing programs and know how to design experiments that actually teach you something, not just optimize a subject line.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Curious and hands-on with AI:</strong> You芒聙聶re genuinely excited by what AI can do for CR
